name: The Gameshow 2
description: Kelly and Sadie have been kidnapped, stripped naked, and restrained by the Ringmistress and forced to compete in a dark web death game with extreme consequences.
location: An unknown location with an underground makeshift gameshow stage.
actorRelationships: Ringmistress is the host of the gameshow that Sadie and Kelly are being forced to compete in.

data.text:
The cold metal of the chair digs into your bare skin as you struggle slightly against the restraints holding your wrists and ankles firmly in place. The bright pink neon lights of the arena flicker and hum, casting harsh shadows across the smooth, white tiled floor. A stark contrast to the soft, dim lighting that usually fills this space. You can feel the slight draft in the room, making goosebumps prickle across your exposed flesh.

Your rectum is still sore from the massive enema nozzle shoved inside by a woman who calls herself the Rigmistress. A long tube connected to it extends to a mysterious machine.

A second tube extends from the machine and trails across the floor, terminating at the nozzle lodged into the ass of the girl beside you. You see her long hair is matted with sweat, clinging to her face and neck. Her chest rises and falls rapidly with each shallow breath, revealing just how nervous and scared she is, much like yourself.

Please, I'm begging you!" Kelly cried out, her voice echoing in the dimly lit chamber. "Whatever sick game you have planned for us, just stop! Let Sadie and I go, we won't tell anyone, please!" Her eyes were wide with fear as she strained against the restraints holding her down on the cold metal table. The Ringmistress simply smiled wider at Kelly's plea, relishing the desperation in the young woman's voice. 

Sadie, bound and helpless on a neighboring bondage chair, joined in the desperate entreaty. "Don't do this!" she pleaded. "We're innocent, we've never hurt anyone! Whatever you think we've done, we're sorry!
Sadie starts to sob, tears streaming down her face. "Please, Ringmistress," she begs, her voice shaking with desperation. "Don't do this!"

Listen up, you pathetic little worms," the Ringmistress cackled, her eyes gleaming with sadistic glee as she surveyed her captives. "I see you squirming around, trying to dislodge those pesky little tubes. Well, let me enlighten you - those aren't going anywhere. They're connected to a state-of-the-art air pump, custom built for our little games here."

She circled the stage, heels clicking ominously on the concrete floor. "Today, my pretties, we're going to have some fun with your tummies. Imagine your bellies as big, juicy balloons, just waiting to be inflated."

The process of belly inflation via intestinal air injection is a gradual, step-by-step procedure that involves the meticulous introduction of air into the gastrointestinal tract over time. This is typically achieved by inserting a flexible tube, known as a catheter or enema tube, through the anus and advancing it into the rectum until the tip reaches the cecum, the junction between the small and large intestines.

Once properly positioned, the tube is securely fastened, and the other end is connected to an air pump system, which may range from a simple hand bulb to an automated, pressurized device. The air delivery is then initiated, beginning at a low flow rate to allow the body to acclimate to the increasing intraluminal pressure.

I'll begin at a nice slow flow rate to let your bodies get used to the increasing pressure inside.

At first, you might just feel a little pressure building, maybe see a slight bulge forming. But as we keep pumping, that pressure will steadily grow. Your bellies will start to stretch and swell ever so gradually, like two rising dough balls. You'll feel that tight, full sensation spreading across your midsection.

At around 30% capacity, you'll feel noticably tighter. That's usually when the discomort begins, and when the fun really gets going!
You and whimper and sob from your bondage chairs, as Ringmistress speaks of the procedure with a casual air, describing the inflation of your innards as if it were no more than a mundane task.

"Will... will it hurt? The inflation?" Your eyes dart nervously towards the intimidating apparatus, imagining the agonizing stretch of skin and the relentless pressure building inside your abdomen. You swallow hard, trying to push down the wave of fear rising in your throat. "It sounds super dangerous, Ringmistress..."

Ah, my sweet little piggies, let me explain how this delightful game works," the Ringmistress purrs, circling Sadie and Kelly like a shark scenting blood. "You see, we're going to gradually fill up your bellies with air, nice and slow. At first, you won't feel much at all. Just a little pressure, a slight bulge forming."

She leans in close to Sadie, her breath hot on her ear. "But don't worry your pretty little heads. That sweet oblivion won't last long. As we keep pumping, that pressure will start to build. Your skin will stretch taut, swelling noticeably." She licks her lips. "Trust me, it will most certainly hurt, because I designed it that way."

"Enough chit chat, let's get the show on the road!" Ringmistress walks over to a large Prize Wheel with different numbers on the segments. 60, 90, and 120.. "This first round will be a mutual inflation to get you both accustomed to your situation, Let's spin, shall we?"

data.prompt: How many seconds will the first filling last?

data.text: "There we have it, [Play:wheel1] seconds! Okay girls, here come's your first taste of a long evening, brace yourselves!" *Ringmistress presses a button on her podium, and the air machine beeps, followed by a low hiss...
